ddls:
CREATE TABLE "weather_data" (
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather record */,
  "record_date_time" TEXT /* Date and time of the weather record */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location */,
  "outlook" TEXT /* General weather outlook (e.g., sunny, overcast, rain) */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature value */,
  "temperature_unit" TEXT /* Unit of temperature (e.g., Celsius, Fahrenheit) */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Humidity value */,
  "humidity_unit" TEXT /* Unit of humidity (e.g., percentage) */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Wind speed value */,
  "wind_direction" TEXT /* Wind direction (e.g., North, South, East, West) */,
  "play_decision" TEXT /* Decision on whether to proceed with the event (yes/no) */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the weather data */,
  "forecast_accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the weather forecast (e.g., 0-100%) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weather_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_decisions" (
  "decision_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each decision */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather record considered for the decision */,
  "decision_date" TEXT /* Date when the decision was made */,
  "event_status" TEXT /* Status of the event based on the decision (e.g., proceed, reschedule, cancel) */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., concert, sports, festival) */,
  "scheduled_date_time" TEXT /* Scheduled date and time of the event */,
  "actual_date_time" TEXT /* Actual date and time of the event (in case of rescheduling) */,
  "decision_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the decision */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the decision (e.g., 0-100%) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("decision_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_decisions_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_decisions_weather_id FOREIGN KEY ("weather_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("weather_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event */,
  "event_description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the event */,
  "event_date_time" TEXT /* Scheduled date and time of the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_forecasts" (
  "forecast_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather forecast */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location */,
  "forecast_date_time" TEXT /* Date and time of the weather forecast */,
  "outlook" TEXT /* General weather outlook (e.g., sunny, overcast, rain) */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature value */,
  "temperature_unit" TEXT /* Unit of temperature (e.g., Celsius, Fahrenheit) */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Humidity value */,
  "humidity_unit" TEXT /* Unit of humidity (e.g., percentage) */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Wind speed value */,
  "wind_direction" TEXT /* Wind direction (e.g., North, South, East, West) */,
  "forecast_accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the weather forecast (e.g., 0-100%) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("forecast_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_forecasts_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)
column_names: Unique identifier for each weather record

Wind direction (e.g., North, South, East, West)
Decision on whether to proceed with the event (yes/no)

Date when the decision was made
Status of the event based on the decision (e.g., proceed, reschedule, cancel)

Scheduled date and time of the event
